ogTitle: Chittaway Bay vs Chowan Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Chittaway Bay and Chowan Creek.
heading: Chittaway Bay vs Chowan Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Chittaway Bay, New South Wales and Chowan Creek, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Chittaway Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Chowan Creek (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Chittaway Bay or Chowan Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Chittaway Bay has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Chowan Creek scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Chittaway Bay scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Chowan Creek scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Chittaway Bay or Chowan Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Chittaway Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
